title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at India Tourism Development Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at India Tourism Development Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
India Tourism Development Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Tourism Development Corporation:
India Tourism Development Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Tourism Development Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
